treatment_information.treatment_response: KD lesions became softer and less nodular; MF lesions flared transiently then exhibited sustained improvement over 1 year
prompt improvement but recurrence shortly after therapy was discontinued

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented with multiple persistent and disfiguring lesions over the trunk
Treatment with topical, intralesional, and systemic corticosteroids initiated
Treatment with rituximab 375 mg/m2 weekly for 4 weeks initiated
Follow-up revealed significant improvement of MF lesions
Follow-up revealed sustained improvement of MF lesions; KD lesions were softer and less nodular; serum IgE level dropped to 222 IU/L

patient_outcome.final_status: KD lesions persisted but became softer and less nodular; MF lesions exhibited sustained improvement
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow-up at 3 and 6 months after the end of treatment
patient_outcome.recovery_timeline: Sustained improvement of MF lesions over a follow-up period of 1 year
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Markedly affected due to disfigurement from the lesions
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient was bothered by the cosmetic disfigurement from the lesions
